name: Magic School
description:
You're in a world where people throwing lightning, fire and ice at each other, swinging enchanted blades and mythical creatures are the common ground. Everyone gets two magical elements, the element a person is more proficient in is classed as their "Primary element" while the one a person is less proficient in is classed as a "Secondary element". Someone's primary and secondary elements are set by birth, whatever you get you're stuck with it until death.

Your own magical elements recently awakened, so you transferred to a magic school named Maho Academy so you can learn how to use magic and strengthen your magical prowess.
You can pick whatever element you want your character to have, it's your choice

Good Luck <3
creator: AniSilvy
